messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0008",
  "title": "总结",
  "page_index": 4,
  "page_range": "4-1"
}

Section text:
### 总结
该图表清晰地展示了中国移动游戏市场在过去几年的收入变化及未来几年的增长趋势，显示出市场的逐步复苏和稳定增长态势。
[/image_caption]

注释：1、中国移动游戏市场统计范围：仅包含在中国大陆地区上线的移动端游戏，不包含PC端、游戏主机端或其他硬件平台上的游戏（例如一款游戏同时发布了移动端版本、PC客户端版本和游戏主机端版本，本报告也仅统计移动端版本的相关数据）；2、收入规模包含统计范围内用户消费的总金额，不包含广告变现、第三方充值等其他收入模式；3、本报告中后续涉及的“中国收入”相关的统计数据，都以此标准进行统计；4、部分数据可能会在点点数据2026年相关报告中做出调整。来源：中国移动游戏市场收入规模是综合了点点数据、企业财报、专家访谈，根据点点数据统计模型核算所得。

message.content:
This section enables retrieval of answers to questions concerning:
• **Topics & Claims:** Historical revenue changes and future growth trends in the China mobile game market, specifically its gradual recovery and stable growth trajectory.
• **Entities & Data Sources:** Diandian Data (点点数据), corporate financial reports, and expert interviews.
• **Dates & Timeframes:** Past years, future projections, and potential data adjustments scheduled for Diandian Data’s 2026 reports.
• **Definitions & Scope:** Statistical scope limited to mobile games launched in mainland China (excludes PC, console, and other hardware platforms; multi-platform titles count only mobile data). Revenue definition restricted to total direct user consumption, explicitly excluding ad monetization and third-party top-ups. This standard governs all subsequent “China revenue” metrics in the report.
• **Figures & Metrics:** References a chart/figure illustrating revenue fluctuations and growth projections. Core metric is total user consumption revenue.
• **Evidence Types & Methodology:** Data derived from a synthesis of third-party analytics, official financial disclosures, and expert interviews, calculated using Diandian Data’s proprietary statistical model.

response_text:
This section enables retrieval of answers to questions concerning:
• **Topics & Claims:** Historical revenue changes and future growth trends in the China mobile game market, specifically its gradual recovery and stable growth trajectory.
• **Entities & Data Sources:** Diandian Data (点点数据), corporate financial reports, and expert interviews.
• **Dates & Timeframes:** Past years, future projections, and potential data adjustments scheduled for Diandian Data’s 2026 reports.
• **Definitions & Scope:** Statistical scope limited to mobile games launched in mainland China (excludes PC, console, and other hardware platforms; multi-platform titles count only mobile data). Revenue definition restricted to total direct user consumption, explicitly excluding ad monetization and third-party top-ups. This standard governs all subsequent “China revenue” metrics in the report.
• **Figures & Metrics:** References a chart/figure illustrating revenue fluctuations and growth projections. Core metric is total user consumption revenue.
• **Evidence Types & Methodology:** Data derived from a synthesis of third-party analytics, official financial disclosures, and expert interviews, calculated using Diandian Data’s proprietary statistical model.
